info.title: IntrospectFN API
info.description: Browse, sync, and manage bookkeeping data from external ERP systems.

get.description: Public endpoint, no authentication required.
Public endpoint, no authentication required.
Public endpoint, no authentication required.
Public endpoint, no authentication required.
Public endpoint, no authentication required. Only available when GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID is unset.
Public endpoint, no authentication required. Returns HTTP 200 when authenticated, 401 when not.
Public endpoint, no authentication required.

schema.title: Response List Companies Api Companies Get

get.description: Requires authentication. Proxies a paginated list request to the external ERP API.
Requires authentication. Proxies a detail request to the external ERP API.
Requires authentication. Returns the description for a single account.
Requires authentication. Lists file attachments for a voucher, invoice, or supplier invoice.
Requires authentication. Streams a binary file from the ERP archive.
Requires authentication. Returns {record_number: file_count} for all records of a given entity type.
Requires authentication. Lists the root inbox contents from the ERP.
Requires authentication. Streams a binary file from the ERP inbox.
Requires authentication. Lists the contents of an inbox folder from the ERP.
Requires authentication. Returns cached and/or live financial years from the ERP.

schema.title: Response Get Financial Years Api Companies  Connection Id  Sync Financial Years Get

get.description: Requires authentication. Returns sync jobs, states, and record counts.

schema.title: Response Get Sync Status Api Companies  Connection Id  Sync Status Get

post.description: Requires authentication. Restricted to accountant or owner role.
Requires authentication. Restricted to accountant or owner role.

delete.description: Requires authentication. Restricted to developers only.

get.description: Requires authentication. Returns aggregated metric card data.

schema.title: Response Get Dashboard Metrics Api Companies  Connection Id  Dashboard Get

get.description: Requires authentication. Returns vouchers with matching rows for a given account.

schema.title: Response Get Account Analysis Api Companies  Connection Id  Internal Account Analysis Get

get.description: Requires authentication. Returns per-year balance data for an account.

schema.title: Response Get Account Year Balances Api Companies  Connection Id  Internal Accounts  Account Number  Year Balances Get

get.description: Requires authentication. Checks voucher series gaps and invoice number gaps.

schema.title: Response Get Local Integrity Api Companies  Connection Id  Internal Integrity Get

get.description: Requires authentication. Returns a Code-to-Description map for all synced voucher series.

post.summary: Refresh a single record from ERP (accountant+)
post.description: Fetches fresh data for one record from the external ERP and updates the local DB.

schema.title: Response Refresh Record Api Companies  Connection Id  Internal  Doc Type   Record Id  Refresh Post

get.description: Requires authentication. Returns a single locally synced record by type and ID.

schema.title: Response Get Local Record Api Companies  Connection Id  Internal  Doc Type   Record Id  Get

get.description: Requires authentication. Returns paginated, filterable locally synced records.

schema.title: Response Get Local Records Api Companies  Connection Id  Internal  Doc Type  Get

get.description: Requires authentication. Returns sync state across all companies.

schema.title: Response Get Sync Overview Api Sync Overview Get

get.description: Requires authentication.

schema.title: Response Get Staging Action Api Staging  Action Id  Get

patch.summary: Edit a staged action (assistant+ for own, accountant+ for any)
patch.description: Requires authentication. Accountant/owner can edit any staged action; assistants can edit their own staged actions.

schema.title: Response Patch Action Api Staging  Action Id  Patch

post.description: Requires authentication. Restricted to owner or accountant role.

schema.title: Response Approve Action Api Staging  Action Id  Approve Post

post.summary: Reject a staging action (accountant+ or own staged action)
post.description: Requires authentication. Accountant/owner can reject any action; assistants can reject their own staged actions.

schema.title: Response Reject Action Api Staging  Action Id  Reject Post

post.description: Requires authentication. Restricted to owner, accountant, or assistant role. Creates a new 'staged' action from any existing action.

schema.title: Response Clone Action Api Staging  Action Id  Clone Post

post.description: Requires authentication. Restricted to owner or accountant role.

schema.title: Response Resume Action Api Staging  Action Id  Resume Post

post.description: Requires authentication. Restricted to owner or accountant role.

schema.title: Response Execute Actions Api Staging Execute Post

get.description: Requires authentication. Restricted to users with the developer attribute.

post.description: Requires developer attribute for allow_developer_tools; owner role for allow_mutation.

post.description:
Delete file connections (and optionally other entities) from a sandbox
company's Fortnox account. Requires developer access and allow_mutation
on the sandbox company.

post.summary: Create bot user + API key (owner only)

post.description:
Bot rotates its own key. Both old and new keys remain valid
until the new key is first used for a normal API call.
Owner-initiated rotation: immediately replaces the key hash.

get.description: Show confirmation page for issuing an API key. Redirects to login if not authenticated.

post.description: Owner confirms → create user+key, generate auth code, redirect back.

post.summary: Exchange auth code for API key
post.description: Exchange the one-time auth code for the raw API key (server-to-server).
